blocksCertification: Low visual count by design: this is a software how-to whose tools have no product photos, so only 1 verified image (the hero) is embedded. Reaching 8 verified images would require forcing irrelevant product cards, which the brief explicitly forbids. Certification should wait on Codex infographics (tool decision tree, axis-to-key workflow, stepped-vs-analog), not on forced product photos.

Hero is a verified gear photo (thrustmaster-twcs-throttle-engine-lever.jpg) used as an interim bay hero because the brief required heroImage to be a verified path and all verified paths are /images/gear/... A purpose-built editorial bay hero from Codex would be stronger.
reWASD price quoted as EUR34.99 / ~$35+ from the official 2026 blog; confirm the live USD store figure before certifying any hard dollar claim.
Ships At Sea / Seafarer controller-support notes are community-reported and patch-sensitive; re-verify current wheel/joystick status before certification.
